name: skal-monorepo
description: Skal — Solid → bridge → Flutter app framework. Internal monorepo: framework in packages/, apps in examples/.

scripts._three_commands: // ─── the three commands you usually run ─────────────────
scripts.test: bun run test:codegen && bun run test:flutter
scripts.analyze: cd packages/skal_flutter && dart analyze lib/ test/ && cd ../skal_codegen && dart analyze lib/ bin/
scripts._low_level: // ─── lower-level (setup.sh wraps these; call them directly only for incremental re-builds) ──
scripts.build:libskal: cd vendor/bun && PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" bun run build:release
